sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86563" key="proanati/qhmi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προανα-τίθημι</orth>, <sense id="n86563.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dedicate before,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">προανετέθη</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">T A M</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.408.18</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>(Patara, <date TEIform="date">ii A.D.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
